title: rosa rubiginosa subsp. comosa
intro: Rosa rubiginosa subsp. comosa is a subspecies of the fragrant rose, scientifically known as the fragrant dog rose, which is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits associated with Rosa rubiginosa subsp. comosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Rosa rubiginosa subsp. comosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
